news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: There is no victory yet against inflation.
QuantHealth partners with Atropos Health's 300M+ patient records for better trial outcomes, speeding up therapies at point of care.
news.summary: QuantHealth, an innovative drug development platform powered by AI, has recently revealed a new collaboration with Atropos Health, a renowned company specializing in converting clinical data into top-tier personalized real-world evidence for healthcare services. Through this partnership, QuantHealth aims to enhance its trial outcome forecasts by utilizing Atropos Health's vast federated data model, comprising over 300 million patient records. This collaboration is anticipated to expedite the delivery of life-saving treatments to patients by bolstering point-of-care solutions. The amalgamation of QuantHealth and Atropos Health signifies a significant advancement in the pharmaceutical field, with a considerable impact on trial efficiency and patient care.

news.headline: JP Morgan Asset Management partners with CAIS to expand advisor access to alternatives, providing access to its strategies.
news.summary: In New York, CAIS, the top alternative investment platform for independent financial advisors, revealed a partnership with J.P. Morgan Asset Management, a renowned global investment management company. This collaboration will grant advisors access to J.P. Morgan's alternative investment strategies, boosting the range of options available. The move showcases CAIS' commitment to revolutionizing alternative investments within the wealth management sector.

news.headline: Keen Decision Systems & MADTECH.AI partner to create the first end-to-end MarTech decision engine, combining MMM measurement, planning, and execution in one platform.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina, Keen Decision Systems, a marketing mix SaaS company, has partnered with MADTECH.AI, a marketing, advertising, and data decision intelligence platform. Their collaboration aims to develop the inaugural all-encompassing MarTech decision engine, providing real-time MMM measurement, planning, and execution within a unified platform. Typically, various MarTech companies handle measurement, planning, execution, and optimization processes separately. This partnership seeks to streamline these functions into a single platform, offering a comprehensive solution to marketers.

news.headline: Xsolla founder releases Once Upon Tomorrow Fortnite Island, immersing players in a novel's world. Innovative experience in Unreal Editor, combining parkour challenges with narrative elements.
news.summary: Shurick Agapitov, the founder of Xsolla and a prominent figure in the gaming industry, has introduced the Once Upon Tomorrow Fortnite Island release in Los Angeles. This new Fortnite Creative map based on his novel offers an immersive gaming experience. Created using Unreal Editor for Fortnite (UEFN), the map seamlessly blends high-speed parkour challenges with thematic elements from Once Upon Tomorrow. Players are invited to engage with the innovative gameplay and explore the rich narrative world. The release has garnered excitement among gaming enthusiasts, with a high number of players anticipated to test their skills in this unique virtual setting.

news.headline: GlobalLogic partners with Nokia to innovate in 5G solutions for enterprises in sectors like automotive, industrial, and financial.
news.summary: A company based in Santa Clara, California, GlobalLogic Inc., has revealed a new partnership with Nokia aimed at boosting the implementation of advanced 5G and 4G enterprise solutions. Utilizing Nokia's Network as Code platform and developer portal, GlobalLogic will spearhead innovation within various enterprise sectors, particularly automotive, industrial, and financial industries. This collaboration is intended to generate impactful use cases that demonstrate tangible results, with a specific focus on enhancing technology adoption in these sectors.

news.headline: Asia-Pacific IFM market is growing due to advanced facility solutions and sustainability compliance, with steady growth in developing economies. Public sector support and energy emphasis driving market.
news.summary: An analysis report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Asia-Pacific Integrated Facility Management Market 2024-2029" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Asia-Pacific (APAC) integrated facility management (IFM) market has been steadily growing, with a focus on developing economies propelling this growth. While more established markets have seen a slower advancement rate, the overall trajectory remains positive. The market benefits from robust regulatory backing, particularly from the public sector, and an increasing emphasis on energy efficiency.

news.headline: Coupa's Inspire event in Vegas from May 12-15 & World Tour in 5 countries, aiming for profitable growth in Dec 2024.
news.summary: A prominent event for professionals in procurement, finance, supply chain, and IT is coming back to Las Vegas. Additionally, a new World Tour roadshow will take place across five countries. On December 12, 2024, in Foster City, California, Coupa revealed plans for its main event signaling an opportunity for significant growth. The event serves as a platform for industry experts to gather, share insights, and explore partnerships. This year's event is anticipated to attract a large number of attendees and promises to provide valuable networking opportunities for participants.

news.headline: Clearfield introduces StreetSmart® Ready Connect™ Terminal, a craft-friendly fiber terminal supporting up to 8 drop connections.
news.summary: Minneapolis - Clearfield, Inc. unveiled the StreetSmart® Ready Connect™ Terminal (RCT), a compact fiber terminal for pedestal use accommodating up to eight drop connections. The RCT was created in response to market demands and customer input, offering solutions for space limitations and installation simplicity. This launch represents Clearfield's dedication to advancing community broadband connectivity. The StreetSmart® RCT aims to streamline fiber deployment processes, enhancing efficiency for operators.

news.headline: In 2024, Unlearn made strides in AI for clinical development, reducing trial and error in medicine.
news.summary: Unlearn made significant progress in enhancing AI to remove trial and error in medicine in the year 2024 in San Francisco.

news.headline: US households pay $1,495/yr in hidden bill costs, $4.46 trillion spent annually - doxo report.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report from doxo reveals that hidden expenses linked to bill payments add up to a staggering $196 billion each year, translating to an average of $1,495 per household. Annually, American households collectively spend more than $4.46 trillion on various bills, out of which $3.35 trillion is dedicated to the top 10 most frequently occurring bills. The ability to stay organized with these payments significantly impacts consumer financial well-being, with widespread confusion and intricacy resulting in billions of dollars in preventable costs.

news.headline: 2025 global real estate outlook positive, highlights sector trends and strategies for growth, as per Hines report.
news.summary: In 2025, global real estate markets could experience a significant shift, as predicted by Hines, a prominent real estate investment manager. According to their "2025 Global Investment Outlook" report titled "A New Dawn: Seizing Real Estate’s Moment of Opportunity," this year marks a crucial phase in the industry's evolution. The report outlines essential trends and sector-specific approaches that Hines believes will influence the global real estate market as it enters a new phase of expansion and revitalization. This analysis offers insights into potential opportunities for growth and recovery.

news.headline: Siemens and Oracle Red Bull Racing mark 20 years of collaboration in Formula 1, one of the longest partnerships in the sport.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, as of December 12, 2024, Siemens Digital Industries Software is marking the 20th year of its partnership with Oracle Red Bull Racing, making it one of the enduring technical collaborations in Formula 1™. This longstanding relationship has been vital in enhancing performance, innovation, and technological advancements in the sport over the years.

news.headline: Kairon Labs partners with Solidus Labs to enhance market compliance for MiCA, redefining ethical market making.
news.summary: A company based in New York and Antwerp, Belgium, Kairon Labs, has partnered with Solidus Labs to improve market compliance and risk management solutions. The collaboration aims to enhance readiness for compliance with MiCA regulations.

news.headline: TerSera presents new real-world evidence on goserelin treatment in women with breast cancer at 2024 symposium.
news.summary: TerSera Therapeutics LLC in Deerfield, Illinois, shared findings on the efficacy of goserelin 3.6 mg and goserelin 10.8 mg in premenopausal women with breast cancer at the 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. Presented data in a poster session revealed from a retrospective, observational study indicated non-inferiority. The study utilized de-identified patient-level data and was held from December 10-13 in San Antonio, Texas. Access the poster for further details.

news.headline: Industry veteran Joel Pecoy joins Barings to lead U.S. Real Estate Debt Asset Management, overseeing $25 billion portfolio.
news.summary: Barings, a prominent real estate investment management company, revealed the appointment of Joel Pecoy as the head of U.S. Real Estate Debt Asset Management. Pecoy, an experienced industry professional, will take charge of overseeing an extensive portfolio of around $25 billion in real estate debt, encompassing close to 380 assets across the United States. He will also play a pivotal role in the U.S. Real Estate Debt Investment Committee and will supervise a team of 12 asset managers.

news.headline: SentinelOne named Gartner® Customers’ Choice for Managed Detection and Response with 95% recommendation rate from 210 users.
news.summary: SentinelOne, a prominent company in AI-driven security solutions based in Mountain View, California, has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the Gartner Peer Insights 'Voice of the Customer: Managed Detection and Response Services' report. Over 210 users reviewed SentinelOne's Managed Detection and Response (MDR) services, with an impressive 95% indicating their readiness to recommend them. This acknowledgment underscores SentinelOne's strong foundation for top-tier cyber defense services. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol S.

news.headline: Valiant Eagle Inc. (OTC: PSRU) and Truestone Trading LLC join to develop 3 mining sites in DRC for global expansion.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 12, 2024, Valiant Eagle Inc. (OTC: PSRU) collaborated with Truestone Trading LLC to form a significant partnership aimed at the development and utilization of three key mining locations in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). This innovative alliance signifies a major step forward for both organizations, showcasing their commitment to...

news.headline: About 47% of Americans have missed holiday events due to illness in recent years. 1 in 3 worry about it happening again.
news.summary: In Deerfield, Illinois, a recent survey from Walgreens revealed the challenge of staying healthy during the holiday season. The study showed that 47% of Americans have missed a festive event in recent years due to sudden illness, and nearly one in three individuals are concerned about facing a similar situation this year. This fear of missing out (FOMO) and the associated stress during the holiday season are common. Findings from the Walgreens survey indicate that Americans are becoming more proactive in their approach to health during this period.

news.headline: Red Hat releases RHEL AI 1.3, its latest foundation model platform, marking significant AI innovation.
news.summary: The newest version of Red Hat's foundation model platform, RHEL AI 1.3, has officially been released and is now accessible to the public in Raleigh, North Carolina.

news.headline: John McKibbon, III to receive 2025 Hunter Conference Award for Excellence and Inspiration. Recognizing his exceptional leadership in hospitality industry.
news.summary: The Hunter Hotel Investment Conference in Atlanta revealed that John McKibbon, III, the founder of M3 and chairman of McKibbon Hospitality and McKibbon Places, will receive the 2025 Hunter Conference Award for Excellence and Inspiration. This prestigious annual award recognizes outstanding leadership, citizenship, and innovation in the hospitality industry. McKibbon, a third-generation entrepreneur, has played a pivotal role in shaping the sector through his various hospitality ventures.

news.headline: Crunch Fitness opens $5M, 35,000 sq ft facility in Lake Worth, FL with CR Fitness as franchisee.
news.summary: A new Crunch Fitness location, Crunch Lake Worth, is set to open in Lake Worth, Florida. The $5 million investment has gone into creating a modern 35,000-square-foot gym that is expected to open this winter. This facility is operated by CR Fitness, a franchisee of Crunch Fitness.

news.headline: New report by LG Ad Solutions reveals TV ads influence U.S. gamers' purchase decisions. Spending in the U.S. video game market hit $113 billion in 2023.
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, LG Ad Solutions, a prominent player in CTV and cross-screen advertising, released a report titled "The Connected Gamer," showcasing insights into American gamer behaviors and preferences, as well as emphasizing the impactful role of CTV advertising in influencing their buying choices. The report underscores the considerable economic influence of gamers in the US, who allocate significant funds towards gaming goods and services. The US video game market in 2023 alone amassed more than $113 billion in revenue.

news.headline: JTV introduces 600+ name brand fragrances for the holidays, expanding product lineup significantly.
news.summary: A well-known retailer in jewelry and lifestyle goods has unveiled a new range of products for the holiday season. The company, based in Knoxville, Tennessee, made the announcement on December 12, 2024. JTV®, also known as Jewelry Television, is recognized for its extensive selection of products and has decided to significantly broaden its product offerings with...

news.headline: Triton Digital released November 2024 U.S. Podcast Ranker, iHeart Audience Network topped with 66.0M Avg Weekly Downloads.
news.summary: Triton Digital®, a global technology and services provider for digital audio, podcast, and broadcast radio sectors, has unveiled the results of its November 2024 reporting period (November 4, 2024 – December 1, 2024) for the U.S. Podcast Ranker, utilizing Triton’s Podcast Metrics measurement service. The iHeart Audience Network maintained its lead as the top sales network for November, garnering the #1 position with 66.0 million average weekly downloads and 19.4 million average...

news.headline: Study highlights high rates of depression and suicidal thoughts among AANHPI youth. Calls for addressing mental health challenges.
news.summary: A recent report, considered one of the most thorough studies on the subject, delves into the specific stressors impacting Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) youth. The report also examines their coping mechanisms and suggests ways to tackle the various challenges and misinterpretations faced by this often overlooked demographic. The study was conducted in San Francisco and was made public on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Bota Bio launched HeliaGenesis at 2024 FiE, with 1,500 manufacturers and 25,000 attendees in Frankfurt.
news.summary: In San Francisco and Hangzhou, China, on December 12, 2024, the 31st edition of Food Ingredients Europe (FiE) recently wrapped up after running from November 19th to 21st, 2024, in Frankfurt, Germany. With participation from over 1,500 ingredient manufacturers and attracting a crowd exceeding 25,000 attendees, the event was deemed a success.

news.headline: T-Mobile awards $50,000 grants to 25 towns across US, totaling $15 million for 350 communities in 48 states.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed the newest 25 recipients of its Hometown Grants program. Each recipient is set to obtain up to $50,000 in funding from T-Mobile to initiate local development initiatives that improve and empower their communities. Since launching its five-year dedication to small towns and rural areas in April 2021, the Un-carrier has bestowed over $15 million in Hometown Grants to 350 communities spanning 48 states and one U.S. territory.

news.headline: New AI watchlist app, Alpha, by Public launches globally. Provides real-time market insights for individual investors.
news.summary: A new mobile app named Alpha has been launched today in New York by investing platform Public. This standalone app utilizes artificial intelligence to provide real-time market insights for individual investors globally. The app aims to cater to a wide audience of users seeking to enhance their investment strategies with the help of cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: SoundHound AI's Amelia Platform is a leader in Enterprise Conversational AI in Healthcare; market set to reach $2.34 billion by 2027.
news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. disclosed that its Amelia Conversational AI Platform was recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Frost Radar™ for Enterprise Conversational AI in Healthcare. Predictions from Frost & Sullivan reveal that this market is projected to hit $2.34 billion by 2027, growing at a CAGR of 17.2%. The report extensively evaluated over 100 enterprise conversational AI solutions, showcasing the potential growth and impact within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Rethink appoints new CFO and CMO; aims to lead in behavioral health solutions globally. Dec. 12, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: Experienced corporate leaders have recently joined Rethink to spearhead the company's ongoing triumph in providing data-based behavioral health solutions to communities worldwide. On December 12, 2024, in New York, Rethink, a prominent SaaS software and services supplier within the behavioral health sector, shared that a significant number of seasoned executives have joined their team. This move aims to fortify Rethink's position as a leader in delivering cutting-edge behavioral health solutions globally.

news.headline: Waymo's co-CEO to keynote CES 2025 leaders in tech dinner, discussing autonomous vehicles & mobility. (Numbers: CES 2025, Dec. 12, 2024)
news.summary: Ed Ludlow from Bloomberg will be conducting an interview with the co-CEO of Waymo to discuss autonomous vehicle technology and the future of mobility. This event is organized by the Consumer Technology Association (CTA), the entity behind CES, the renowned tech event. The interview is scheduled to take place in Arlington, Virginia on December 12, 2024. Waymo, a key player in the autonomous vehicle industry, will have its co-CEO share insights on the advancements in this field and what to expect in the coming years. This interview is expected to provide valuable information to the audience regarding the innovative developments in autonomous vehicles.

news.headline: Zamorano selects Ellucian Banner SaaS to modernize university tech ops, enhance academic excellence in Honduras.
news.summary: A cutting-edge cloud-based student information system is being implemented to enhance the digital infrastructure and user experiences at a pioneering institution excelling in agricultural education. The institution, located in TEGUCIGALPA, Honduras, is partnering with a company based in RESTON, Va. The collaboration, announced on Dec. 12, 2024, is set to revolutionize operations by utilizing the latest technology. This initiative aims to elevate efficiency and effectiveness in managing student data.

news.headline: Playa Hotels & Resorts accepting bookings for Wyndham Alltra Punta Cana opening on April 1, 2025, the brand's second all-inclusive in the Dominican. Based in Fort Lauderdale, FL, Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V. (NASDAQ: PLYA).
news.summary: Wyndham Alltra Punta Cana, the second all-inclusive resort of the brand in the Dominican Republic, is set to welcome guests starting from April 1, 2025. The announcement was made on December 12, 2024, from FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. by Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V., a prominent figure in the all-inclusive resort industry in Mexico and the Caribbean. Playa, listed on the NASDAQ as PLYA, owns and manages several resorts across the regions. The opening of Wyndham Alltra Punta Cana indicates the brand's expansion and commitment to offering top-notch hospitality experiences in the sought-after destination.

news.headline: Fresh Thyme Market nominated for Cincinnati Best Awards in Nutrition/Vitamin/Supplement Store category.
news.summary: Honored for excellence in the Nutrition/Vitamin/Supplement Store sector, Fresh Thyme Market in DOWNERS GROVE, Illinois, has been acknowledged as top-tier. On December 12, 2024, the Midwest-founded retailer, committed to promoting better health in communities, revealed its latest achievement at Harper's Point.

news.headline: Lucent Real Estate is selling a property in Beverly Hills' The Flats neighborhood, attracting crypto buyers.
news.summary: In Beverly Hills, California on December 12, 2024, Lucent Real Estate, Inc., a licensed California real estate brokerage with DRE License #01908229, is excited to showcase an exclusive real estate chance in The Flats, a highly sought-after neighborhood in Beverly Hills. This property offers a unique opportunity...

news.headline: Qnovo introduces SentinelX©, a battery safety solution for electric vehicles to prevent fires and recalls, launched ahead of CES 2025.
news.summary: Qnovo has introduced SentinelX©, a cutting-edge solution for battery safety in electric vehicles, aiming to prevent fires and recalls. This innovative technology is set to be unveiled at CES 2025, offering protection to consumers on the road. Through SentinelX©, automakers can potentially save billions of dollars by avoiding costly recalls. This advancement is a significant step in enhancing battery health and safety in the automotive sector.

news.headline: Revolution Sustainable Solutions acquires Island Plastics to boost sustainable materials; leader in recycling. Little Rock, Arkansas, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Revolution Sustainable Solutions, LLC, based in Little Rock, Arkansas, revealed on December 12, 2024, the successful acquisition of Island Plastics, LLC. Island Plastics is known for being a top producer of materials created entirely from post-consumer sources. Revolution is a notable company specializing in sustainable materials and recycling solutions. This acquisition marks a significant move for Revolution as it expands its market presence and offerings in the sustainability sector.

news.headline: Mindy Kaling to teach MasterClass on success scripting, sharing journey from staff writer to showrunner. Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: A writer and producer nominated for an Emmy has revealed insights into the path to success, discussing experiences from starting as a 24-year-old staff writer to becoming a showrunner, creator, and producer. The individual shared these lessons from their journey. The disclosure was made in San Francisco on Dec. 12, 2024. MasterClass, the online platform offering a variety of courses, served as the setting for this presentation.

news.headline: Medscape's 2050 Challenge calls for medical students to submit 150-word pitches on future of medicine; finalists get published.
news.summary: Medscape is currently seeking 150-word pitches that depict innovative future visions in the medical field. These entries should cover various medical topics. Chosen finalists will have the opportunity to expand on their concepts and have their work featured on Medscape. The announcement was made in Newark, N.J., on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Hunt Capital Partners and Intervest Corp. open 33-unit Carnation Village in Tupelo, Miss. - Business Wire #affordablehousing
news.summary: A joint effort between Intervest Corporation, Hunt Capital Partners, and The City of Tupelo culminated in the grand opening of Carnation Village on December 5th. This affordable housing project marks a significant milestone in providing housing solutions.

news.headline: Air Canada flight attendants launch pop-up in Montreal from Dec 13-15 to showcase unpaid work issues, revealing airline's corporate greed.
news.summary: In Old Montreal, a new interactive pop-up event running from December 13 to 15 will showcase the adverse experiences passengers may face and the existing challenges encountered by flight attendants in the aviation industry. The parody experience, titled Unfair Canada, offers an exaggerated portrayal of corporate greed within airlines, introducing a series of "new features" to highlight these issues. Wesley Lesosky, the President, expressed concerns over the unpaid hours flight attendants endure, emphasizing the hardships faced in the industry.

news.headline: Rubrik Security Cloud - Government receives FedRAMP® authorization for moderate impact level, ensuring data security for NNSA.
news.summary: Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK), a data security company, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, has unveiled Rubrik Security Cloud – Government, which has been granted Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®) authorization at the Moderate Impact Level. This cloud solution, founded on a zero trust architecture, is designed to safeguard enterprise, cloud, and SaaS data to maintain operational continuity following cyber threats. Notably, Rubrik Security Cloud – Government has been selected by the National Nuclear Security Administration (NNSA), an Office within the U.S. Department of Energy, to enhance its data security measures.

news.headline: Message Broadcast names Raed Adhami Chief Innovation Officer, leading innovation strategy for customer engagement software.
news.summary: A new Chief Innovation Officer, Raed Adhami, has been appointed by Message Broadcast, a top provider of customer engagement software for the electric utility sector. In this position, Raed will spearhead the Company’s innovation initiatives, focusing on creating a unique and all-encompassing platform for customer engagement and other essential workflows. Raed, known for his expertise in driving technology innovation in enterprise software, is set to leverage his experience to further develop Message Broadcast's offerings.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Financial-stability risks remain elevated.
Tenpoint Therapeutics Ltd. & Visus Therapeutics, Inc. merge to create innovative ophthalmic medicines, including presbyopia-correcting eye drop BRIMOCHOL™ PF, set for NDA filing in 1H, 2025.
news.summary: Tenpoint Therapeutics, Limited (“Tenpoint”) and Visus Therapeutics, Inc. (“Visus”) have officially completed their merger, marking the establishment of a new era in ophthalmic therapeutic medicines focused on revitalizing the aging eye. This strategic merger combines a late-stage presbyopia-correcting eye drop, BRIMOCHOL™ PF, which is anticipated to be a leader in its category and is scheduled for NDA submission in the first half of 2025, with a robust pipeline of groundbreaking therapeutic treatments. The union brings together the strengths and expertise of both companies in order to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate buys back 45,759 shares for EUR 114,397.50, announces update on shares issued.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, INVL Baltic Real Estate bought back 45,759 shares from its shareholders for a total of EUR 114,397.50. As a result, the company now provides data on its issued shares as of that date.

news.headline: MAST and UST propose new farming license for Kaldvík Hf. in Iceland, up to 10,000 tonnes MAB, 6,500 tonnes fertile, 3,500 tonnes sterile salmon.
news.summary: Today, the Iceland Food and Veterinary Authority (MAST) and The Environmental Agency of Iceland (UST) have announced a new farming license proposal for Kaldvík Hf., a subsidiary of Kaldvik AS. The license allows for a maximum biomass of 10,000 tonnes in Seyðisfjörður, Eastfjords of Iceland. The proposal specifies that up to 6,500 tonnes of fertile salmon can be present at any given time, with the remaining 3,500 tonnes consisting of sterile salmon, across three new sites in Seyðisfjörður.

news.headline: Trump, asked about chances of war with Iran: Anything can happen - Time Interview.
Hainan sees rise in international travelers due to visa-free policy and internet celebrity videos - Dec 2024.
news.summary: In Haikou, China, on December 12, 2024, a report from the Hainan International Media Center indicated that due to the expansion of Hainan's visa-free policy, facilitating travel to the island province in south China, the influx of international travelers has increased. This year witnessed a noticeable uptick in international travel numbers, reflecting the growing popularity of visiting Hainan.
